title: Restore pre-whitepaper styling on all non-whitepaper pages and add Whitepaper CTA to homepage

requirements.text: Restore frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx to its pre-whitepaper visual state (hero banner, feature grid, navigation buttons, color scheme, typography, spacing, and layout) exactly as it appeared before the whitepaper feature was added, while retaining the 'Read the Whitepaper' call-to-action button or card that links to /whitepaper using the existing gold accent button style.

quotes: revert all non-whitepaper pages back to their original look
just add the whitepaper somewhere on the homepage

acceptanceCriteria: Home page hero banner, feature grid, and CTA section look identical to the version before the whitepaper feature was introduced.
A 'Read the Whitepaper' button or card is present on the homepage and navigates to /whitepaper.
The Whitepaper CTA uses the existing gold accent button style consistent with other CTAs on the page.
No whitepaper-specific layout or style overrides bleed into the homepage.

requirements.text: Restore frontend/src/components/Header.tsx to its pre-whitepaper visual state (logo placement, nav link styling, authenticated balance display, mobile menu) while keeping the existing 'Whitepaper' navigation link that was already added.

quotes: revert all non-whitepaper pages back to their original look

acceptanceCriteria: Header appearance (colors, font sizes, spacing, logo) matches the original dark navy/gold design from before the whitepaper feature.
The 'Whitepaper' nav link remains present and functional.
Authenticated user balance and login/logout button render correctly.

requirements.text: Restore frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx to their pre-whitepaper visual state — reverting any layout, typography, color, or spacing changes that were introduced as a side effect of the whitepaper feature implementation.

quotes: revert all non-whitepaper pages (Home, IP Database, Registration, Coin Dashboard) back to their original look

acceptanceCriteria: IP Database page card layout, filter controls, pagination, and dark navy/gold styling are identical to before the whitepaper was added.
Register IP page form fields, file upload, error/success states, and gold-accented button styling are identical to before the whitepaper was added.
Coin Dashboard stats cards and transfer form appearance are identical to before the whitepaper was added.
No whitepaper-specific global CSS or Tailwind overrides affect these pages.

requirements.text: Restore frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx and frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx to their pre-whitepaper visual state, reverting any structural or styling changes introduced by the whitepaper feature while preserving the whitepaper route in App.tsx.

quotes: revert all non-whitepaper pages back to their original look

acceptanceCriteria: Layout wrapper (Header + Footer + content area) renders identically to before the whitepaper was added on all non-whitepaper pages.
Footer branding, copyright, and links are unchanged.
The /whitepaper route remains registered in App.tsx and Whitepaper.tsx is untouched.

requirements.text: Audit frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js for any global style changes introduced by the whitepaper feature implementation that affect non-whitepaper pages, and revert only those changes while preserving whitepaper-specific print styles and prose utilities.

quotes: the app does not look the same please revert the app to what it looked like before but keep the whitepaper in

acceptanceCriteria: Global CSS variables and Tailwind config are restored to their pre-whitepaper values for all shared tokens.
Whitepaper-specific styles (e.g., print media queries, prose classes scoped to the whitepaper page) remain intact.
No visual regressions appear on Home, IP Database, Register IP, or Coin Dashboard pages due to global style changes.

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx — its content, layout, and styling must remain exactly as implemented.
Keep the /whitepaper route registered in frontend/src/App.tsx.
Keep the 'Whitepaper' navigation link in frontend/src/components/Header.tsx.
Do not touch any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not modify any backend files.
nonGoals: Redesigning or improving any page beyond restoring the pre-whitepaper state.
Adding new features to any page other than the Whitepaper CTA on the homepage.
Changing the Whitepaper page content, layout, or styling.
